name: Cloud-Native & Container Platform
description: Managed Kubernetes platform (EKS, OpenShift, CCE) with integrated container lifecycle management, monitoring, logging, registries with vulnerability scanning, GitOps pipelines, and Knative serverless on AWS and Open Telekom Cloud.
positioning: Enterprise Kubernetes-as-a-Service with security built in. For organizations that want cloud-native velocity without building platform engineering teams from scratch.
competitive_moat: Pre-hardened security posture, multi-cluster management across sovereign and hyperscaler environments
